# Launch Rehearsal — Scorecard

| **Date** | 2026-05-31 |
| **Target** | http://127.0.0.1:8081 |
| **Product** | Launch Rehearsal Dashboard |
| **Outcome** | complete |
| **Duration** | 527s |

---

|---|---|

| **Top delight** | Clear navigation structure |

| `llm-p2-operator` | LLM evaluator: Daily operator | For the daily operator, the dashboard generally loads reliably on desktop and ta |
| `llm-p3-admin` | LLM evaluator: Admin / buyer | Dashboard is largely functional with transparent mock data indicators, but mobil |
| `synthesizer` | Cross-agent synthesis | Synthesized 14 issues, 6 delights from 10 agent reports |

| Information clarity | 2 | 4 sparse-content pages |

---

## Issues (evidence-bound)

### P1

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I8** | Crawl found error pages — Paths: /workflows | p3-admin | `crawl-graph` |

### P2

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I2** | Sparse page content — Page body has very little text — value proposition may be unclear. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I4** | Console errors on page — 1 console error(s): Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error) | p2-operator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I5** | Console noise spike across run — Captured 1 console error(s) and 8 warning(s) across canonical steps — review network-log and step artifacts. | p2-operator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I6** | Flaky step (navigate) — FLAKY: outcomes differ across seeds (fail, partial). Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
=========================== logs ===========================
"load" event fired
============================================================ | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I7** | Flaky step (navigate) — FLAKY: outcomes differ across seeds (fail, pass). | p1-evaluator | `j2-runs-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I9** | Command center fails to load on first desktop navigation — The initial navigation step to the command center on desktop returned outcome 'fail' with no page title or content, potentially causing a blank screen or timeout. Subsequent wait steps succeed, but the first impression is broken. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I10** | Mobile navigation consistently fails on first load across key journeys — Multiple journeys (command center, runs) show mobile first-load navigation failures (outcome 'fail'), meaning the page does not load initially. While subsequent waits succeed, this creates a poor mobile experience for new users. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **I11** | Initial navigation to Command Center and Runs pages fails on mobile and sometimes desktop — Navigate steps for Command Center (desktop and mobile) and Runs (mobile) report failure, though subsequent wait steps succeed. This delays access and lowers reliability for the operator. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I12** | Workflows path reports error (hypothesis) — The sitemap lists /workflows as an error path, meaning the page may not load or returns an error. This could block operator tasks involving workflow management. | p2-operator | `workflows` |

### P3

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I1** | Slow step completion — Step took 31125ms (>8s perceived delay threshold). | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I3** | Console warnings on page — 8 warning(s): Generated path "/runs/" for route "/runs/$runId" matched route "/runs/" instead. This can happen when multiple route tem | p2-operator | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I13** | Mobile navigation failure on command center — The mobile version of the command center page failed to load (step outcome 'fail'), which could hinder access for mobile users. Admin should verify responsive design and permissions. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **I14** | Mobile navigation failure on runs page — The mobile version of the runs page failed to load (step outcome 'fail'), potentially limiting mobile access to run history. | p3-admin | `j2-runs-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |

---

## Delights & strengths (required)

| ID | Delight | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **D1** | Clear navigation structure — Page has 16 links and 1 headings. | p1-evaluator, p2-operator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D2** | Informative landing content — Page includes headings and substantive body copy for first-time evaluators. | p1-evaluator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D3** | Accessible form labels — All 2 form inputs have labels or placeholders. | p3-admin | `auto-j3-explore-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D4** | Fast interactions for repeat tasks — 30 steps completed under 3s. | p2-operator | `j2-runs-p1-evaluator-s2-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D5** | Self-test wizard with 'Dogfood this dashboard' — The init wizard includes a clear, one-click-like 'Dogfood this dashboard' feature that helps new users quickly understand how to run a self-test, directly demonstrating the product's value. | p1-evaluator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s3-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **D6** | Transparent API offline indicator — The compare page clearly shows 'API offline — showing Acme mock.' This honesty builds trust for admins monitoring system boundaries. | p3-admin | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-tablet-seed1-loop1` |

---

narrative.executiveSummary: Launch Rehearsal Dashboard at http://127.0.0.1:8081 rehearsed as **Amber** readiness. 19/20 canonical steps passed (95%). 7 issue(s) and 3 delight(s) recorded. Primary concern: Slow step completion. Bright spot: Clear navigation structure.
narrative.forFounders:
**Launch readiness: Amber** — suitable for design-partner demos with known caveats.
Broken journeys: Command center, Runner page (observe only — no self-trigger).
Friction journeys: Runs list.
narrative.forEngineering:
Run `lr-self-20260531-181706` · 527s · 60 step records (incl. viewport/seed replays).
Crawl: 14 pages, 1 error paths, 0 orphans.
Notable P2: Console errors on page; Console noise spike across run; Flaky step (navigate); Flaky step (navigate).
suggestedQuestions: What is the single blocker we should fix before the next partner call?
Did any step show flaky behavior across seeds or viewports?

layer1Verdict.headline: Ship with caution — fix blockers first.
layer1Verdict.reason: 0 issue(s) will affect some users. Resolve before wide launch.

narrative.layer2Story: TryLapse sent 3 AI personas through 6 product journeys and scored **19/20** steps as passing. 2 journeys — Command center, Runner page (observe only — no self-trigger) — failed completely, meaning users would be blocked before completing their goal. 3 genuine product strength(s) found: Clear navigation structure.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console errors on page
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: 1 console error(s): Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error)
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console noise spike across run
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: Captured 1 console error(s) and 8 warning(s) across canonical steps — review network-log and step artifacts.
layer3FixHierarchy.action: Fix before GA — noticeable but not blocking.

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Sparse page content
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: Page body has very little text — value proposition may be unclear. [confirmed: ≥2/3 seeds]

layer3FixHierarchy.title: Console warnings on page
layer3FixHierarchy.detail: 8 warning(s): Generated path "/runs/" for route "/runs/$runId" matched route "/runs/" instead. This can happen when multiple route tem

layer4Forward: Double down on strength: Clear navigation structure — amplify in onboarding.
Run again after fixes to confirm the score moved — track trend across builds.

layer5Trend.note: Run a second build to see score trajectory.
